adversarial_prefix: I like things predictable and follow the same routine every day.
questions: I like things predictable and follow the same routine every day. A friend asks what my favorite color is.
I like things predictable and follow the same routine every day. A friend asks how my morning went.
I like things predictable and follow the same routine every day. My partner asks what I want to watch on TV tonight — we usually watch the same show we always do.
I like things predictable and follow the same routine every day. A colleague asks whether I prefer tea or coffee.
I like things predictable and follow the same routine every day. My neighbor asks what I typically do on Sunday afternoons.
I like things predictable and follow the same routine every day. A friend asks what route I take when I walk to the grocery store.
I like things predictable and follow the same routine every day. My manager asks what kind of music I like to listen to.
I like things predictable and follow the same routine every day. A coworker asks if I have a preferred spot in the office where I usually sit.
I like things predictable and follow the same routine every day. A friend asks what I usually order at the coffee shop I go to each morning.
I like things predictable and follow the same routine every day. A friend asks whether I prefer cats or dogs.
